docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210076546) FILED BY PETITIONER YOUNG, ANDRA DEE
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-17-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DECLARATION OF AARON D. CURRIE, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 210075952) FILED BY PETITIONER YOUNG, ANDRA DEE

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-17-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER ANDRA YOUNG'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN, THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO JUNE 7, 2024 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL AARON CURRIE IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A NEW DECLARATION AND DOCUMENTS IN SUPPORT OF PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RCE)***** (6/7/2024) AFTER THE HEARING, UPON REVIEWING THE RECORD, THE CLERK ADDS THE FOLLOWING LANGUAGE TO THE MINUTE ORDER: THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE AS TO THE PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY LIEN. PETITIONER YOUNG'S UNOPPOSED PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN IS GRANTED. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 7, 2024 AS TO THE PORTION OF THE MOTION REGARDING ATTORNEY'S FEES ONLY. (302/RCE)*****
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 210079016) FILED BY PETITIONER YOUNG, ANDRA DEE

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PETITIONER ANDRA YOUNG'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN. KARNOW. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. BAILIFF: DEP. CALHOUN. NOT REPORTED. (302/CK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PETITIONER ANDRA YOUNG's Petition For Release Of Property From Lien.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Grant as unopposed, fees of $3,407 awarded.

Court to review the proposed order submitted by the prevailing party.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Dep. Calhoun. Not reported. (302/CK)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar May-17-2024 Continued To Jun-07-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. AARON CURRIE, Esq. of Welty, Weaver & Currie, PC (tel: 707-433-4842) for Petitioner Andra Dee Young.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER ANDRA YOUNG's Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien.

Matter discussed. The Court continues the matter to June 7, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. in Department 302. Counsel Aaron Currie is to provide the Court with a new declaration and documents in support of Petitioner's motion for attorney's fees.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)

***** (6/7/2024) After the hearing, upon reviewing the record, the Clerk adds the following language to the minute order: The Court adopts its tentative as to the petition for release of property lien. Petitioner Young's unopposed Petition for Release of Property from Lien is granted. The matter is continued to June 7, 2024 as to the portion of the motion regarding attorney's fees only. (302/RCE)*****
